title: AAP v1 wire frames
description: JSON Schema for the four Agent Adapter Protocol (aap/1) NDJSON frame types on a duplex connection: the handshake and envelope (adapter -> app), and the decision and actuate frames (app -> adapter). Frames are structurally distinguished by their top-level key (aap / event / verdict / actuate). Each frame is one JSON object on one newline-terminated line. Decoders in NotchideKit are lenient (unknown fields ignored, most missing fields defaulted); this schema documents a conformant frame. See docs/PROTOCOL.md.

capability.description: observe: read-only status. gate: block the agent awaiting a decision. actuate: keep the connection live to RECEIVE app-pushed prompt/interrupt frames (voice ACTUATE); advertised only by HOST-style adapters that own a live agent session.

eventKind.description: Maps onto the fixed four-state lane/glyph model. An unknown/absent kind degrades to 'errored'.

verdict.description: allow approves, deny blocks, ask defers to the agent's own permission prompt. Deferring entirely is expressed by sending no decision frame at all.

handshake.title: AAP handshake (adapter -> app, first line on every connection)

aap.description: Wire version. MUST be "1"; any other value causes the app to close the connection.

capabilities.description: Announced capabilities. Unknown strings are dropped by the app; encoded sorted, order not significant.

decisionRequest.title: Decision request (carried on a needsDecision event)

id.description: Correlation id; typically equal to the envelope id. MUST be a valid UUID or the app decodes the event with no decision.

prompt.description: Human-readable description of what is being gated (e.g. the command).

providerID.description: Originating provider, e.g. "sh.claude". Defaults to "" if absent.

agentSessionID.description: Vendor session id. The app forms the lane key from (providerID, agentSessionID, cwd). Defaults to "".

title.description: Optional short label. Omitted (not null) when absent.

command.description: Optional human-readable command. Omitted when absent.

decision.description: Present if and only if kind == needsDecision; omitted otherwise.

payload.description: The full original vendor payload, preserved losslessly. Defaults to {}.

at.description: Event time as epoch seconds (may be fractional). Defaults to 0.

allOf.$comment: decision is present iff kind == needsDecision.

id.description: Correlation id; the decision frame echoes it.

wantsDecision.description: true only when a gate adapter is blocking on a decision for this frame (a needsDecision event).

id.description: Echoes the originating envelope id / decision.id.

reason.description: Optional human-readable rationale. Omitted (not null) when absent by the reference encoder; null is also accepted on decode.

redirect.description: Optional app-level steer. Never forwarded into a vendor's own decision output. Omitted when absent.

sessionKey.title: SessionKey (nested tuple; carried by the actuate frame)
sessionKey.description: Identifies exactly one session as (provider, agentSessionID, cwd). Routes a pushed action to the host that owns that provider.

actuateFrame.title: ActuateFrame (app -> adapter, PUSH; actuate-capable connections only)
actuateFrame.description: A voice-driven ACTUATE action pushed to the HOST adapter that owns the target session, over a live actuate-capable connection. All contents live under the top-level 'actuate' key (the framing tag). Pushing to a provider with no live actuate connection is a safe no-op.

kind.description: prompt delivers a fresh instruction (carries text); interrupt is a barge-in that stops the session (no text).

text.description: The instruction to run. Present if and only if kind == prompt; omitted for interrupt.

allOf.$comment: text is present iff kind == prompt.
